paths.name: react
paths.message: Direct `useEffect`/`useLayoutEffect` is banned. Use `useMountEffect` from `@/hooks/use-mount-effect` for one-time external sync, or refactor per .agents/skills/no-use-effect/SKILL.md (derived state, event handlers, data-fetching libs, key prop). If genuinely outside the five rules, write `React.useEffect(...)` with a `// no-use-effect skill exemption` comment block above the call site — the pre-commit guard at `scripts/check-no-use-effect.mjs` will accept it.
